name: The Back Nine Golf | Peoria, AZ - South Glendale
address: 9828 W Northern Ave Suite 1775, Peoria, AZ 85345
about: The Back Nine Golf in Peoria, Arizona, serves as a premier indoor entertainment destination combining golf simulation with a social atmosphere. The venue features multiple simulator bays where golfers can play famous courses or practice their swing in a climate-controlled environment. The facility is designed to accommodate various skill levels, offering an accessible way for players to enjoy the game year-round regardless of weather conditions. The focus is on creating a comfortable and engaging space where the sport intersects with leisure and social interaction. Guests can expect a modern setting suited for both practice sessions and casual play with friends.
why_golfers_like_it: Social atmosphere with bar and food

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers a full kitchen and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for all ages.
